who: HR managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 timesheets/month
offer: For HR managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 timesheets/month, exceeding policy limits causes compliance issues. We alert HR ops instead of manual tracking of timesheets and hours.
problem: Monitoring employee hours to prevent policy violations
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM 20-50 HR managers with a demo video
Join community forums for HR tools sharing
try_it: Let users try Manual entry of timesheets and Dashboard for tracking submitted hours on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
